description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single deploy stage containing a deploy_to_production job that runs in the deploy stage, uses the default Docker image, sets the environment to production, and executes the exact shell command `GIT_SSH_COMMAND="ssh -i ~gitlab-runner/.ssh/push_to_prod" git push --force git@gitlab.gitlabtutorial.org:root/example4.git +HEAD:production`. The job has no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules, and pushes directly to the production branch via SSH.
